hook: Moving off-app should lower friction, not raise emotional stakes.
body: A transition works better when it sounds practical and calm instead of like a test of commitment.

hook: Men sometimes frame the move as if the other person is now required to prove serious interest.
body: Keep the tone simple: this is just a cleaner channel or an easier way to make a plan.

body: Asking to text because it is easier to coordinate the date usually lands better than treating the app exit like a milestone.
